Event: Royal Challenge - Season 47
Event Date: 01/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A312
Modular Overload

Triggers: Once in a while

Realm of Ice
The unit freezes 4 random enemy units for 4 sec. For the duration, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec. During that time, a field of silence is active around the frozen units, and all enemy units in a small radius around them are unable to use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set).

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
